limitations: This artifact supplies row-specific evidence metadata so the parity harness can distinguish these rows from the broad installed runtime/source audit row-id list.

Rows with future exact-behavior refinements should be reopened as explicit matrix rows instead of broadening this artifact beyond the behavior covered by the listed PostMeter tests and Desktop source/runtime audit.
This artifact does not grant scripts any host filesystem, Node, Electron, renderer, raw network, or unreviewed package capabilities.
notes: This artifact supports the row-specific desktop behavior evidence gate for implemented Desktop-required rows that do not have a narrower dedicated artifact.
